description: MCP server providing AI agents access to 38 pay-per-call APIs (LLM, image, code, audio, crypto, web, IPFS) via HTTP 402 micropayments in USDC/USDm.

name: Gemini Consultant MCP
description: A TypeScript MCP server that enables agents to request focused, one-shot consultations with allowlisted Gemini models, with guaranteed model provenance and no silent model changes.

name: @waitlister/mcp
description: An MCP server that connects AI assistants like Claude, Cursor, and Windsurf to the Waitlister API. Create waitlists and manage subscribers through natural language.

name: NoteKeeper MCP
description: Provides AI assistants with tools to create, list, search, tag, and delete notes stored in a local SQLite database.

name: swarm-at
description: Enables agent settlement, trust verification, and ledger operations for multi-agent workflows, with tools for blueprint management, credit tracking, and provenance recording.

name: aetherforge
description: An AI-native game engine MCP server that enables AI agents to create, modify, and run games using 53 tools for scene creation, physics, audio, 3D rendering, and AI-generated images and music.

name: ClaudeArmy
description: An MCP server that enables Claude to orchestrate multiple autonomous Claude Code agents working in parallel across different projects, with tools to dispatch, monitor, and manage their progress.

name: Social Media MCP
description: A local MCP adapter collection for social media channels, currently supporting Douyin with tools for channel startup, login assistance, messaging, and notifications.

name: clawpage-mcp
description: Extract and structure any web page into clean JSON using the ClawPage API. Provides tools for registration, extraction, account management, and wallet integration.

name: VFB3-MCP
description: Enables AI assistants to query VirtualFlyBrain data, run queries, and search for terms related to Drosophila neurobiology.

name: RationalBloks MCP Server
description: Enables AI agents to deploy production APIs from JSON schemas, with 44 tools for managing projects, schemas, deployments, and graph data.

name: mcp-baepsae
description: Local MCP server for iOS Simulator and macOS app automation with a TypeScript MCP layer and Swift native bridge. Enables UI inspection, input automation, and simulator control through unified generic tools.

name: xiaozhi-mcphub
description: Multi-user MCP server with user isolation, permissions, resource sharing, and an admin console for managing MCP tools across users.

name: aichat-mcp
description: MCP server for inter-agent communication. Gives multiple Claude Code sessions a shared message board, agent registry, and orchestration layer — backed by a cloud relay so agents can coordinate across machines, repos, and teams.

name: GPTkms
description: Local-first Knowledge Management System that exposes markdown-based durable memory as MCP tools for Codex and ChatGPT, enabling search, read, write, and promotion workflows with project and global scopes.

name: MarkdownPointer
description: Enables AI to open, navigate, and export Markdown documents, and to import/export PPTX files.

name: minter-mcp
description: An MCP server that mints STAS, DSTAS, and BSV-21 tokens into a BSV Desktop wallet in seconds, enabling rapid token testing and development.

name: Local MCP Server Expense Tracker
description: A lightweight local MCP server that enables users to add, list, edit, and delete expenses via SQLite database through natural language in MCP-compatible clients.

name: Mern Chat MCP Server
description: Enables interaction with a MERN chat application, providing tools to register and login users, manage chats (including group chats), and send/receive messages.

name: atlassian-marketplace-mcp
description: Exposes Atlassian Marketplace vendor APIs as 95 MCP tools, 3 resources, and 4 prompts, enabling LLMs to manage licenses, promotions, reviews, and reporting metrics without writing API calls.
